use_cases: Customer support chat widget for websites and web applications
AI assistant integration for SaaS platforms providing user guidance
Help desk widget for real-time customer service
Interactive user guidance system for onboarding experiences
Quick query interface for AI-powered knowledge bases
ai_summary: A floating AI chat assistant widget featuring a glowing 3D button with gradient effects that opens into a complete chat interface. Includes text input with character counting, click-outside-to-close functionality, and smooth animations. The component uses glass-morphism styling with glowing borders and is designed as a persistent overlay for customer support, guidance, or AI interaction use cases.
